mapper.insert: INSERT INTO invitations (id, organization_id, email, role, token, expires_at, created_by, created_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{email}, #{role, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UserRoleTypeHandler}, #{token}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{createdAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, organization_id, email, role, token, expires_at, created_by, created_at, accepted_at FROM invitations WHERE organization_id = #{organizationId, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler} AND email = #{email} AND accepted_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM invitations WHERE expires_at < NOW() AND accepted_at IS NULL
